question_ar: رأيت طفلًا يبكي في الشارع، ماذا تفعل؟
question_en: You see a child crying in the street. What do you do?
options_en: Comfort him and ask what's wrong

question_ar: وجدت محفظة على الأرض، ماذا تفعل؟
question_en: You found a wallet on the ground. What do you do?
options_en: Take the money and throw it

question_en: Your teacher forgot his bag. What do you do?

question_ar: أحد زملائك يتعرض للتنمر، ماذا تفعل؟
question_en: One of your classmates is being bullied. What do you do?
options_en: Help him and tell the teacher

question_en: Your mother asks for help. What do you do?
